Change 1: Replace:
  # Index triples by subject for cross‑reference (e.g., mission details)
      from collections import defaultdict
      triple_by_subject = defaultdict(list)
      for t in triples:
          triple_by_subject[t.subject].append(t)
  
      # Group triples by subject for sentence construction
      groups = defaultdict(list)
      for t in triples:
          groups[t.subject].append(t)
with:
  # Index triples by subject for cross‑reference (e.g., mission details)
      from collections import defaultdict
      triple_by_subject = defaultdict(list)
      for t in triples:
          triple_by_subject[t.subject].append(t)
  
      # Build auxiliary information for missions (operator, crew members, etc.)
      mission_info = defaultdict(lambda: {"operator": None, "crew": [], "commander": None, "backupP...
      for t in triples:
          p = t.predicate.lower().replace(" ", "")
          if p == "operator":
              mission_info[t.subject]["operator"] = t.object.strip().strip('"')
          elif p == "crewmembers":
              mission_info[t.subject]["crew"].append(t.object.strip().strip('"'))
          elif p == "commander":
              mission_info[t.subject]["commander"] = t.object.strip().strip('"')
          elif p == "backuppilot":
              mission_info[t.subject]["backupPilot"] = t.object.strip().strip('"')
  
      # Group triples by subject for sentence construction
      groups = defaultdict(list)
      for t in triples:
          groups[t.subject].append(t)
Change 2: Replace:
  if p == "mission":
              # Assume subject is an astronaut; describe crew membership in the mission
              return f"was a crew member of {obj}"
with:
  if p == "mission":
              # Assume subject is an astronaut; describe crew membership in the mission,
              # and enrich with operator and other crew members if available.
              mission = obj.strip().strip('"')
              info = mission_info.get(mission, {})
              parts = [f"was a crew member of {mission}"]
              if info.get("operator"):
                  parts.append(f"operated by {info['operator']}")
              # List other crew members (exclude the astronaut themselves if present)
              other_crew = [c for c in info.get("crew", []) if c != subj]
              if other_crew:
                  parts.append("alongside " + ", ".join(other_crew))
              return " ".join(parts)
